FILE: frontend/src/third_party/open-dronelog/NOTICE.txt

Open DroneLog mapping-stack notice

This CDR Analyzer map port uses the same public mapping stack documented by
Open DroneLog:

- react-map-gl
- MapLibre GL
- deck.gl
- Esri World Imagery
- OpenStreetMap
- OpenTopoMap

The original Open DroneLog repository is:
https://github.com/arpanghosh8453/open-dronelog

Open DroneLog is licensed AGPL-3.0-only. The original FlightMap.tsx is a large,
drone-telemetry-specific component and is not copied unchanged into this
project. This adapter preserves the CDR Analyzer data model and page layout
while using the same map engine, map-type choices and Deck.gl overlay approach.

Do not represent this CDR-specific adapter as the original Open DroneLog
application or as an official Open DroneLog component.
